epic.arc: The foreign review of exports/landing-throughput/ comes home as work. Each finding is a proposed atom under this one arc; bdo's confirm-arc queues them all, his decline retires them — either way the review stops stranding as context.
epic.context: Returned through the inbound envoy seam (done-line 0059) against seal 46fa30be0089… on exports/log.jsonl. The reviewer saw a sealed snapshot, so every finding is PROPOSED and unverified: the value gate judges each story and a session verifies its claim against the live repo before any is acted on.
epic.value: A foreign review becomes value-gated, queued work instead of read-only context — the return leg the one-way envoy lacked.
epic.horizon: Every finding judged by the value gate and either carried under bdo's confirmed arc or refused; none hand-carried into a doc.

pieces.glue: The actuator model (bdo co-design): the gateway IS the actuator — pull/block/route happens because the gateway enforces an ambient threshold (a homeostatic setpoint), and it enforces BOTH ways: shed/quarantine excess, and FILL voids (a sub-setpoint absence is a fill-trigger). The patrol is a scheduled surfacer over a bounded location, composed of surfacers, that finds work near its gateway and routes it by state, reports activity, detains (reversible quarantine) bad actors, and logs threshold use — the sense/act line held: the patrol may quarantine and present, never judge. Settings derived where possible, grounded in environmental policy. Value: terminal pull gets a concrete actuator (threshold enforcement), and the loop senses-and-fills voids instead of only draining.

Where/how/when a gateway pulls is not a fixed arc-vs-slice choice — it is inferred per case from exemplars, bounded by the gateway's enumerated routes plus environmental policy. The whole behavior is workflow-as-code: composed from configuration, COMPILED by composition (the @-import scope-stack pattern generalized), routed through a gateway. Value: pull/route behavior is re-derived just-in-time within bounds (the inference-as-composition layer) instead of hard-coded, so route choice adapts without settling-drift while staying auditable.

An economy governs the mesh: contribution accrues wealth; wealth is policed into policy/privilege (policy policed by wealth of contribution); anything spending or gaining disproportionate value is INSPECTED (the loop's anti-money-laundering). It wires on folds that already exist — impact.py (value/wealth by settling; it refuses mercury = fake value) and energy.py (cost/spend, strain) — NOT a new currency; 'disproportionate' is an anomaly over impact (gain) and energy (spend). Value: leverage and waste both become visible and inspectable, and large flows get a second look by construction.

The bank has two poles, both derived, never hand-asserted. Exemplars (good, to share and emulate) are derived by folding over agents' impacts and efforts at gateways — so exemplar != landing, and the stalled arcs (27 pieces of effort) are NOT exemplar-dark (this resolves the cold-start). Notorieties (bad) are derived from witnessed violation of policy and priors. The negative pole GENERATES exemplar definitions by inversion (the grip discipline: the non-example defines the example), and the violation stream re-derives the definition (freshness — never frozen). Boogeyman lifecycle, star-chamber-proof by category: named-before-proof = untidiness (soft: surface and inspect, never detain — a 'ghost accusation'); witnessed violation = hard notoriety (licenses reversible quarantine); rehabilitated/dissolved = superseded or cleaned. The definitions of exemplar AND boogeyman are themselves versioned, refusable, gated atoms. Value: the system learns what good and bad are from its own evidence, without minting fakes or detaining on a vibe.

How a contributor ENTERS the economy. Agents are an open set (D-4, virtual nodes blink in and dissolve) so they cannot be pre-registered — invert it: log the HERALD (a versioned generative skill) plus the append-only log, and let 'registered' and 'reputation' be folds, never a table. A herald introduces a suitable agent (name, title, RANK = the trust rung's floor) and 'well met' is a bounded admission through the gateway (herald proposes, policy admits). We log heralds and herald-skills, not agents. Reputation is the exemplars/notorieties bank folded, but value is DISTRIBUTED (bdo) along the log's provenance edges — the agent earns and the herald that vouched earns a meta-reputation — which dissolves the credential-vs-herald fork (value flows to the whole chain). The FELT FEEL of an agent (bdo) is that distributed-value fold rendered as anima (strength x tempo): standing sensed on meeting, derived not authored (hard to say = derive it). Teeth: a fresh agent starts at floor-rung zero privilege (escaping notoriety escapes TO powerlessness), re-mint-to-dodge is churn retro/heal already senses, the herald is on the provenance edge of every act it vouches. The mint at the gateway; exemplars-and-notorieties is the bank it feeds.
